headline: Block Links 40% Job Cuts To AI And Margin Reset
summary: Block (NYSE:XYZ) announced plans to reduce its workforce by 40%, linking the decision directly to AI driven productivity gains. Management, including Jack Dorsey and CFO Amrita Ahuja, described the cuts as a restructuring aimed at efficiency and higher margins. The move positions Block as one of the first large public companies to explicitly connect mass layoffs to AI adoption rather than weaker demand. Block runs a mix of businesses across payments, small business tools and consumer...

headline: Exclusive: Block’s CFO explains the AI leaps over 18 months that led to the decision to slash nearly half its workforce
summary: New tools including its custom LLM "goose" gave leaders confidence that smaller teams can now handle “really meaningful bodies of work,” says Block’s CFO and COO Amrita Ahuja.

headline: 'All Garbage': Billionaire Ken Griffin Says AI Jobs Panic Is Hype Because Companies Can't Raise Billions Without Promising AI 'Will Change the World'
summary: Open social media today and you see doom and gloom everywhere — AI is about to wipe out every job, and there's little hope left for human workers. But billionaire Ken Griffin says much of that panic is just a narrative to justify raising the billions needed to keep the expensive, cash-burning AI race going.
